mapper.sql: select m.message_id, m.rule_id, coalesce(r.rule_name, m.rule_name) as rule_name, m.indicator_id, coalesce(i.indicator_name, m.indicator_name) as indicator_name, m.warning_level, m.region_name, m.current_value, m.threshold_value, m.push_channels, m.receivers, m.message_status, m.trigger_time, m.handle_time, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark from nc_warning_message m left join nc_warning_rule r on r.rule_id = m.rule_id left join nc_fusion_indicator i on i.indicator_id = m.indicator_id
mapper.select:
m.del_flag = '0'
AND coalesce(r.rule_name, m.rule_name) like '%' || #{ruleName} || '%'
AND coalesce(i.indicator_name, m.indicator_name) like '%' || #{indicatorName} || '%'
AND m.warning_level = #{warningLevel}
AND m.message_status = #{messageStatus}
AND m.region_name like '%' || #{regionName} || '%'
order by m.trigger_time desc, m.message_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into nc_warning_message (rule_id, rule_name, indicator_id, indicator_name, warning_level, region_name, current_value, threshold_value, push_channels, receivers, message_status, trigger_time, handle_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{ruleId}, #{ruleName}, #{indicatorId}, #{indicatorName}, #{warningLevel}, #{regionName}, #{currentValue}, #{thresholdValue}, #{pushChannels}, #{receivers}, #{messageStatus}, #{triggerTime}, #{handleTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select count(1) as total_count, sum(case when cast(trigger_time as date) = current_date then 1 else 0 end) as today_count, sum(case when message_status in ('handled','archived') then 1 else 0 end) as handled_count, sum(case when message_status in ('sent','read') then 1 else 0 end) as pending_count from nc_warning_message where del_flag = '0'
select warning_level as stat_name, count(1) as count_value from nc_warning_message where del_flag = '0' group by warning_level order by warning_level
select region_name as stat_name, count(1) as count_value from nc_warning_message where del_flag = '0' group by region_name order by count(1) desc limit 10

select coalesce(i.indicator_name, m.indicator_name) as stat_name, count(1) as count_value from nc_warning_message m left join nc_fusion_indicator i on i.indicator_id = m.indicator_id where m.del_flag = '0' group by coalesce(i.indicator_name, m.indicator_name) order by count(1) desc limit 10

select cast(trigger_time as date) as stat_name, count(1) as count_value from nc_warning_message where del_flag = '0' and trigger_time >= current_date - interval '29 days' group by cast(trigger_time as date) order by cast(trigger_time as date)
